# GitHub Repository About — Recommended Settings

Use these values when editing the repo **About** section (click the gear icon next to "About" on the repo page).

## Description

```
AUTON — TypeScript framework for AI agent delegation, multi-agent orchestration, and adaptive task decomposition. Zero dependencies, OpenAI-compatible. Based on Intelligent AI Delegation research.
```

## Topics (add these)

```
typescript
ai-agents
multi-agent
delegation
llm
openai
mcp
model-context-protocol
task-decomposition
agent-orchestration
```
